Settings About - Validate header and description texts from settings sections
Chat User B - Validate friend request was accepted
Settings Accessibility - Click on slider switch to enable Open Dyslexic option
Chat User B - Both users can react with the same emoji to a message
Chat User A - Validate Chat Message displays timestamp and user who sent it
